zuna.name: ZUNA
zuna.description: Zyphra's 380M-parameter masked diffusion autoencoder for EEG. Denoises, reconstructs missing channels, and upsamples scalp-EEG signals. Trained on ~2M channel-hours.

luna-base.name: LUNA Base
luna-base.description: PulpBio's topology-agnostic EEG foundation model — base variant (7M params). Uses cross-attention to map arbitrary channel layouts to a fixed latent space. Pretrained on >21,000 hours of EEG.

luna-large.name: LUNA Large
luna-large.description: PulpBio's topology-agnostic EEG foundation model — large variant (43M params). Deeper temporal encoder and wider unification module than base.

luna-huge.name: LUNA Huge
luna-huge.description: PulpBio's topology-agnostic EEG foundation model — huge variant (311M params). Highest quality embeddings; needs ≥ 8 GB VRAM.

reve-base.name: REVE Base
reve-base.description: Brain-BZH REVE foundation model — 72M params, 512-dim embeddings. Pretrained on 60,000+ hours of EEG from 92 datasets (25,000 subjects). 4D Fourier positional encoding for arbitrary electrode configurations. NeurIPS 2025.

reve-large.name: REVE Large
reve-large.description: Brain-BZH REVE foundation model — ~400M params, 1250-dim embeddings. Largest REVE variant; highest quality EEG embeddings. NeurIPS 2025.

opentslm.name: OpenTSLM
opentslm.description: Time-Series Language Model for reasoning over multivariate medical data. Trainable TransformerCNN encoder (128-dim) + frozen LLM backbone (Qwen3 GGUF via llama.cpp). 5-stage curriculum: wearable MCQ, captioning, HAR chain-of-thought, sleep-stage EEG CoT, ECG arrhythmia CoT. Processes accelerometer, gyroscope, EEG, and ECG.

sensorlm.name: SensorLM
sensorlm.description: Sensor-language foundation model family (CLIP/CoCa variants) for wearable sensor data + natural language. Pretrained on 59.7M hours from 103,000+ people. Multimodal: accelerometer, PPG (heart rate), skin temperature, EDA, gyroscope. Zero-shot recognition, sensor captioning, and cross-modal retrieval.

sleepfm.name: SleepFM
sleepfm.description: Contrastive multimodal sleep foundation model (~3M params, 128-dim). SetTransformer with attention pooling over variable-channel PSG. Processes 4 modalities independently: BAS (10-ch EEG+EOG), RESP (7-ch respiratory+SpO2), EKG (2-ch), EMG (4-ch chin+legs). 128 Hz. Published in Nature Medicine.

sleeplm.name: SleepLM
sleeplm.description: Multimodal CoCa (Contrastive Captioners) model aligning polysomnography with natural language (~385M params, embed_dim=512). Dual-axis transformer with RoPE, SwiGLU, RMSNorm. 10-channel PSG input: EEG (C3/C4), ECG, EMG chin, EOG (E1/E2), respiratory (ABD/THX/AF), body position. 64 Hz, 30s epochs. Generates natural-language sleep reports.

osf-base.name: OSF Base
osf-base.description: Open Sleep Foundation ViT-Base (~86M params, 768-dim). DINO+iBOT self-distillation on 166,500 hours of polysomnography from 9 cohorts. Multimodal 12-channel PSG input: EEG, ECG, EMG, EOG, respiratory (ABD, THX, NP, SN). 64 Hz, 30s epochs.

signaljepa.name: SignalJEPA
signaljepa.description: S-JEPA PreLocal — Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture for EEG with dynamic spatial attention. Spatial convolution + multi-layer convolutional feature encoder (embed_dim=64). Designed for seamless cross-dataset transfer. Graz BCI Conference 2024.

labram.name: LaBraM
labram.description: Large Brain Model — BEiTv2-inspired transformer pretrained on large-scale EEG with neural tokenization. Q/K normalization, gamma residual scaling, and channel-aware 10-20 position embeddings (embed_dim=200). ICLR 2024.

eegpt.name: EEGPT
eegpt.description: Pretrained Transformer for universal EEG representation (~10M params, embed_dim=512). Dual self-supervised learning with spatio-temporal alignment and masked reconstruction. Channel embeddings for spatial flexibility. NeurIPS 2024.

tribev2.name: TRIBE v2
tribev2.description: Meta AI's multimodal fMRI brain encoding foundation model (177M params, hidden=1152). Predicts cortical fMRI responses to naturalistic stimuli from video, audio, and text. Combines LLaMA 3.2-3B (text), V-JEPA2 (video), and Wav2Vec-BERT (audio) features through an 8-layer 8-head Transformer encoder mapped onto the fsaverage5 cortical surface (~20,484 vertices). Pretrained on 4 fMRI datasets: Algonauts2025, Lahner2024, Lebel2023, Wen2017. d'Ascoli et al., 2026.

brain.name: Brain Encoder
brain.description: 8-layer Transformer encoder with ScaleNorm + RoPE, projects multimodal features onto fsaverage5 cortical surface (20,484 vertices).

text.name: Text Encoder — LLaMA 3.2-3B
text.description: LLaMA 3.2-3B text feature extractor. Extracts per-token hidden states at selected layers, resampled to 2 Hz. Runs via llama.cpp (GGUF). Output: [2, 3072, T].
text.note: Any LLaMA-3.2-3B GGUF quantisation works. Shared with the LLM engine when the llm feature is enabled.

audio.name: Audio Encoder — Wav2Vec-BERT 2.0
audio.description: 24-layer Conformer (600M params, hidden=1024). Extracts intermediate hidden states from raw 16 kHz audio, resampled to 2 Hz. Output: [2, 1024, T].

video.name: Video Encoder — V-JEPA2 ViT-G
video.description: 40-layer ViT-Giant (1.1B params, hidden=1408). Processes 64-frame clips at 16 FPS (4s), extracts hidden states at selected layers, mean-pools spatial tokens, resampled to 2 Hz. Output: [2, 1408, T].

neurorvq.name: NeuroRVQ
neurorvq.description: NeuroRVQ biosignal tokenizer — residual vector quantization for EEG, ECG, and EMG. 4-branch encoder with patch-based FFT + RVQ codebooks. Modality-specific weights for tokenization and foundation model encoding. Burn 0.20 backend.

eeg-tokenizer.name: EEG Tokenizer
eeg-tokenizer.description: NeuroRVQ EEG tokenizer — patch-based FFT encoder with 4-branch RVQ codebooks for EEG signals.

ecg-tokenizer.name: ECG Tokenizer
ecg-tokenizer.description: NeuroRVQ ECG tokenizer — patch-based FFT encoder with 4-branch RVQ codebooks for ECG signals.

emg-tokenizer.name: EMG Tokenizer
emg-tokenizer.description: NeuroRVQ EMG tokenizer — patch-based FFT encoder with 4-branch RVQ codebooks for EMG signals.

eeg-foundation.name: EEG Foundation Model
eeg-foundation.description: NeuroRVQ EEG foundation model — deeper encoder for representation learning and downstream tasks.

emg-foundation.name: EMG Foundation Model
emg-foundation.description: NeuroRVQ EMG foundation model — deeper encoder for EMG representation learning.

cbramod.name: CBraMod
cbramod.description: Criss-Cross Brain Foundation Model (~4M params, d_model=200). Uses criss-cross attention to separately model spatial (channel) and temporal (patch) dependencies. Pretrained on Temple University Hospital EEG Corpus via masked patch reconstruction. ICLR 2025.

models.description: Default ZUNA weights — single safetensors file
LUNA base variant — 7M params, smallest and fastest
LUNA large variant — 43M params, better quality embeddings
LUNA huge variant — 311M params, highest quality, most VRAM
REVE base — 72M params, 512-dim embeddings
REVE large — ~400M params, 1250-dim embeddings
CBraMod — ~4M params, criss-cross attention, d_model=200
EEGPT — ~10M params, dual self-supervised, embed_dim=512
LaBraM — BEiTv2-style, embed_dim=200, neural tokenization
SignalJEPA PreLocal — spatial conv + conv encoder, embed_dim=64
OSF Base — 86M params, 768-dim, multimodal 12-ch PSG (EEG+ECG+EMG+EOG+respiratory)
SleepLM — 385M params, multimodal 10-ch PSG + language, CoCa architecture
SleepFM — ~3M params, 128-dim, contrastive multimodal PSG (EEG+EOG+ECG+EMG+RESP+SpO2)
SensorLM — sensor-language model, wearable multimodal (PPG+accel+EDA+temp+gyro) + text
TRIBE v2 brain encoder — safetensors, ready for Rust inference
TRIBE v2 model hyperparameters (hidden dim, depth, heads, modalities)
Feature-extractor build arguments used at training time
LLaMA 3.2-3B Instruct Q4_K_M — text feature extractor for TRIBE v2 (shared with LLM engine)
Wav2Vec-BERT 2.0 — 600M param audio feature extractor (facebook/w2v-bert-2.0)
V-JEPA2 ViT-G — 1.1B param video feature extractor (facebook/vjepa2-vitg-fpc64-256)
OpenTSLM — ~5M trainable params, 128-dim encoder + frozen Qwen3 LLM backbone
NeuroRVQ EEG tokenizer — 4-branch RVQ codebook encoder
NeuroRVQ EEG config flags
NeuroRVQ ECG tokenizer — 4-branch RVQ codebook encoder
NeuroRVQ ECG config flags
NeuroRVQ EMG tokenizer — 4-branch RVQ codebook encoder
NeuroRVQ EMG config flags
NeuroRVQ EEG foundation model — deeper encoder for representation learning
NeuroRVQ EMG foundation model — deeper encoder for EMG representation learning
